title: Command Suite
description: Command Suite adds a collection of useful commands for survival, creative building, testing, and administration, including God Mode, flight, healing, night vision, and more.
body:
CommandSuite

CommandSuite is a lightweight utility mod that provides a growing set of useful commands designed to improve gameplay and make managing your world easier. Whether you're building, exploring, testing creations, or simply having fun, CommandSuite gives you quick access to powerful tools through simple commands.

Features
God Mode toggle
Flight toggle
Instant healing
Night Vision toggle
Protection Shield toggle
Easy-to-use commands
Lightweight and performance-friendly
Current Commands
/god on
/god off
/fly on
/fly off
/heal
/nightvision on
/nightvision off
/shield on
/shield off
Planned Features
/feed
/repair
/day
/night
/weather
/speed
/home
Additional quality-of-life commands

CommandSuite aims to be a simple, reliable, and expanding toolkit of commands for every type of player.
